about.name: Max Bahar
about.title: Junior at Boston College
about.description: Max Bahar is a Senior studying Economics and Computer Science at Boston College. He grew up in Jakarta, Indonesia and is passionate about. Currently, he is in the midst of his Senior Thesis and working as a Research Assistant for Professor Paul Cichello of BC's Economics Department.

experience.title: The Effect of Health Insurance Type on Stroke Diagnosis
experience.people: Dawn Junet Fazon Sta Ana, Sitora Raupova
experience.description: Over the course of a semester, we completed an original research project that examined the causal effects of health insurance type on stroke diagnosis in the future. We used STATA and the Medical Expenditure Panel Survey to conduct an OLS regression using a time-lagged insurance variable. Although a class-based research project pales in comparison to more advanced research papers, I learned a lot about the research process and the many unexpected obstacles that may come up.

experience.title: City of Boston Digital Team Fellowship
experience.description: At City Hall, I assessed the efficacy of the Boston Trash Day App through the analysis of online statistics, user testing, and an online survey. My work helped inform the city's decisions regarding how the city plans to communicate waste and recycling information. In addition, I also helped the city launch an RFP for User Experience design and conduct detailed quality assurance testing of the city's website migration and Alexa Skill.
